creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
This patch fixes (In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)
Are you saying this patch fixes CVE-2023-22464?

I agree given the URL above.

For CVE-2023-22456, see https://github.com/viewvc/viewvc/issues/311 where a fix was committed "to Enalean/tuleap" - so I conclude that is not patched.
